title: Workhorse Group Reports Second Quarter 2024 Results
text:
Workhorse Group Q2 2024 Financial Results

Report Date: August 20, 2024

Period Covered: Second quarter ended June 30, 2024

Key Financial Metrics

Revenue & Losses: Sales (net): $0.8 million (Q2 2024) vs. $4.0 million (Q2 2023). Net loss: $26.3 million (Q2 2024) vs. $23.0 million (Q2 2023). Net loss per share: $(1.40) vs. $(2.40) year-over-year.

Balance Sheet (as of June 30, 2024): Cash and equivalents: $5.3 million. Total inventory (net): $46.5 million. Accounts receivable: $0.8 million. Accounts payable: $10.5 million. Total assets: $105.4 million. Total liabilities: $46.7 million. Stockholders' equity: $58.6 million.

Six-Month Results (Jan-June 2024): Sales: $2.2 million vs. $5.7 million (2023). Net loss: $55.5 million vs. $48.0 million (2023). Loss per share: $(3.26) vs. $(5.40).

Strategic Highlights

The company emphasized significant work ahead while noting progress on dealer partnerships, Sourcewell contract achievement, and new product development for expanded W56 offerings.
